case_title: ANTHONY R. BREWSTER JR. VS. JUAN G. ESCOBAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BREWSTER JR., ANTHONY R. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JUAN G. DBA  GE TOWING AUTO REPAIR AUTO WRECKER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2011 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON DEC-07-2011 IN DEPT. 506 -JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO PAY $600 ON DECEMBER 20,2011 AND $500 ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT OF $2600 IS PAID. LAST PAYMENT OF $500 IS TO BE MADE ON APRIL 20, 2012. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
